name: Shriya Yerrabelly
notes: Multi-system: Ad Intelligence ($2.5k, deferred), Lead Gen ($500/mo trial), Website Pop-up ($600, 50/50 split). Client: HyperKidz franchise (indoor playgrounds, PHP/HTML/CSS/Bootstrap). Partner: Neha (tech). ICP: franchise owners, $3k+ spend, UK/US/Dubai/Canada/Australia. Goal: 3 closed clients/mo at $3k marketing-as-a-service.

timeline.event: Discovery call — 3 independent needs identified: ad monitoring, lead gen, website automation
WhatsApp chat follow-up — confirmed multi-system approach
Sales script, pitch deck, and proposal generated — 3 independent systems with per-system pricing
Pitch call — walked through deck. Website pop-up = top priority. Lead gen = test at $500/mo. Ad intel deferred to stakeholders.
Website popup system priced at firm $1,000 after scope clarification (8-10 HyperKidz sites)
Follow-up call with Neha. Website confirmed at $600 (50/50 split). Lead gen $500/mo for 3-month trial. Shriya to grant backend access to hyperkidsplay.com. Finance approval pending same day.
Shriya confirmed planning to move forward. Budget for lead gen: $350/mo. Website is Bootstrap CSS/HTML. Call scheduled for Sun/Mon.
Counter-offered bundled deal: Website popup $600 (firm, 10 HyperKidz sites) + Lead gen $400/mo (scaled down from $500). Total $1,000 to start.
Shriya agreed to discuss on upcoming call. Neha will join.
Follow-up call confirmed — Shriya and Neha joined.

current_status: Active negotiation. Bundled offer on table: Website popup $600 + Lead gen $400/mo. Shriya + Neha on the call Mar 1. Waiting on final decision post-call. Deal very likely to close.
